name: Attack
note:
Skill #1 will be used when you select
the Attack command.
<hide name display>
<Enemy or Actor Select>
<Counter Icon: 77>
<Custom MP Cost>
if (user.isStateCategoryAffected('Edges Gem')){
cost = Math.floor(user.mmp * 0.06);}
else{
cost = 0;}
</Custom MP Cost>

<Counter Condition>
physical hit
NOT COUNTER HIT
EVAL: attacker.isAlive()
EVAL: !defender.isStateCategoryAffected('Frozen')
EVAL: !defender.isStateCategoryAffected('Sleep')
EVAL: !defender.isStateCategoryAffected('Stun')
EVAL: !defender.isStateCategoryAffected('Exhaust')
EVAL: !defender.isStateCategoryAffected('Disarm')
EVAL: !defender.isStateCategoryAffected('Petrify')
</Counter Condition>

<setup action>
IMMORTAL: target, true
IMMORTAL: user, true
FACE user: target
</setup action>

<target action>
MOTION WALK: user
MOVE user: target, BASE, 30, auto offset x -75, offset y +0
WAIT FOR MOVEMENT
FACE user: target
MOTION ATTACK: user
MOTION WAIT: user
ATTACK ANIMATION: target
ACTION EFFECT
WAIT FOR ANIMATION
</target action>

<follow action>
CLEAR BATTLE LOG
WAIT: 6
</follow action>

<finish action>
FACE user: HOME
MOVE user: HOME, 24
WAIT FOR MOVEMENT
perform finish
IMMORTAL: target, false
IMMORTAL: user, false
</finish action>

name: Bodyslam
Analyze
note:

<Show Stats Eval>
<Cooldown: 2>

<setup action>
DISPLAY ACTION
OPACITY not focus: 0
IMMORTAL: user, true
IMMORTAL: target, true
FACE user: FORWARD
MOTION CHANT: user
ANIMATION 824: user
WAIT FOR ANIMATION
</setup action>

<target action>
FACE user: target
MOTION SKILL: user
ANIMATION 900: target
WAIT: 45
ACTION EFFECT
WAIT FOR ANIMATION
</target action>

<follow action>
CLEAR BATTLE LOG
WAIT: 30
</follow action>

<finish action>
FACE user: HOME
MOVE user: HOME, 45
MOTION WALK: user
FACE user: HOME
WAIT FOR MOVEMENT
OPACITY not focus: 255
perform finish
IMMORTAL: target, false
IMMORTAL: user, false
</finish action>

name: #{termwords.vit} (VIT)
note:
<Buy Custom Text>
\c[2]#{yedskillshop.cost}\c[0]: 1 \c[1]JP\c[0]

\c[6]#{yedskillshop.eachpointvit}\c[0]:
#{termwords.mhp} (MHP): +10
#{termwords.def} (DEF): +1
#{termwords.cnt} (CNT): +0.05%
#{termwords.aggro} (Aggro): +0.5%
</Buy Custom Text>

<Buy Custom Require>
actor.jp() > 0;
</Buy Custom Require>

<Buy Custom Cost>
var actorid = actor.actorId();
var classId = actor.currentClass().id;
var actorjp = actor.jp();
actor.loseJp(1, classId);
actor._jpSpent += 1;
var maxstat = 250;
var actorhp = actor.hp;
var actormhp = actor.mhp;
var percent = (actorhp / actormhp) * 100;
if (actor._vitPoints >= maxstat){
actor.learnSkill(73);
}
else{
actor._paramPlus[0] += 10;
actor._bonusHp += 10;
actor._paramPlus[3] += 1;
actor._bonusDef += 1;
actor.addCnt(0.0005);
actor._bonusCnt += 0.0005;
actor.addTgr(0.005);
actor._bonusTgr += 0.005;
actor.forgetSkill(73);
actor.setHp(parseInt(percent / 100 * actor.mhp));
actor.refresh();
actor._vitPoints++;
if (actor._vitPoints >= maxstat){
actor.learnSkill(73);
}}
</Buy Custom Cost>

name: Juju Balance
note:
<Actor or Enemy Select>

<damage formula>
if (target.isStateCategoryAffected('Undead') || target.hasTag("Undead") || target.isEnemy()){
value = user.mat - Math.floor(user.mat * ((target.mdf)*0.05)/(20+0.05*(target.mdf)));}
else{
var bonus = 0;
if (!target.isStateAffected(249)){
target.addState(249);
target.setStateCounter(249, 1);
var stacks = target.getStateCounter(249) || 0;}
else{
var stacks = target.getStateCounter(249) || 0;
if (target.hpRate() < 0.5) {
var bonusRate = 0.02;
var mpCostPerStack = 0;
var totalMpCost = 0;
for (var i = 1; i <= stacks; i++){
mpCostPerStack = Math.randomInt(11);
totalMpCost += mpCostPerStack;}
if (user.mp >= totalMpCost) {
user.gainMp(-totalMpCost);
bonus = Math.round(target.mhp * bonusRate * stacks);
target.setStateCounter(249, 0);
target.removeState(249);}
else {
target.setStateCounter(249, Math.min(target.getStateCounter(249) + 1, 5));
var text = 'Insufficient extra MP!';
var motion = 'Pop High, Fall High, Pop Low, Fall Low, Wait, Wait';
var font = 'this.standardFontFace()';
var size = '20';
var color = '#fa6e64';
user.callCustomPopup(text, motion, font, size, color, 0, -32);
}}
else{
target.setStateCounter(249, Math.min(target.getStateCounter(249) + 1, 5));}}
value = Math.round(50 + (2 * user.mat) + bonus);
}
</damage formula>

name: Critical Strike
note:
<Multiple Elements: 14>

<damage formula>
if (Math.random() < 0.35){
var bonusrate = (Math.floor(Math.random() * 16) + 15)/100;
var basedmg = user.atk - Math.round(user.atk * ((target.def)*0.05)/(20+0.05*(target.def)));
var bonusdmg = bonusrate * basedmg;
value = basedmg + Math.ceil(bonusdmg);}
else{
value = user.atk - Math.round(user.atk * ((target.def)*0.05)/(20+0.05*(target.def)));}
</damage formula>

name: Pressuring Uppercut Of Darkness
note:
<damage formula>
var base = Math.ceil(0.5 * user.def);
var bonus = Math.ceil(0.1 * user.def);
var totalbonus = (bonus * target.getStateCategoryAffectedCount('Ailment')) + (bonus * target.getStateCategoryAffectedCount('Positive') * 2);
value = (base + totalbonus) - Math.floor((base + totalbonus) * ((target.def)*0.05)/(20+0.05*(target.def)));
var text = '(+' + totalbonus + '!)';
var motion = 'Pop High, Fall High, Pop Low, Fall Low, Wait, Wait';
var font = 'this.standardFontFace()';
var size = '26';
var color = '#74f5fc';
target.callCustomPopup(text, motion, font, size, color, 45, 0);
var poscount = target.getStateCategoryAffectedCount('Positive');
var ailcount = target.getStateCategoryAffectedCount('Ailment');
var chance = 0.15;
if (Math.random() < chance){
var rate = -chance;
var max = BattleManager.ctbTarget();
var bonus = rate * max + target.ctbSpeed();
target.setCTBSpeed(bonus);
target.startAnimation(408);}
</damage formula>

if (target.isStateCategoryAffected('Undead') || target.hasTag("Demon")){
if (!target.hasTag("Boss")){
target.setHp(0);}}
var slvl = 2.5;
value = user.mat * slvl - Math.round(user.mat * slvl * ((target.mdf)*0.05)/(20+0.05*(target.mdf)));
var members = user.friendsUnit().aliveMembers();
var affected = [];
for (var i = 0; i < members.length; ++i) {
var member = members[i];
if (member && !member.isStateAffected(216)) {
affected.push(member);}}
for (var i = 0; i < affected.length; ++i) {
var member = affected[i];
member.removeStateCategory('Ailment', 2);
member.addState(216);}
</damage formula>

name: Shield Projection System
note:
<damage formula>
value = Math.floor(user.hp * 0.02);
var enemy85Alive = $gameTroop.members().some(function(enemy) {
    return enemy.enemyId() === 85 && enemy.isAlive();
});

if (!enemy85Alive) {

    $gameTroop.addTroopReinforcements(160);
    $gameTroop.newReinforcements().forEach(function(enemy) {
        if (enemy.enemyId() === 85) {
            enemy.addState(265);
enemy._shieldProjectLife = 1;
            enemy.setStateCounter(265, 'x' + enemy._shieldProjectLife);
        }
    });

} else {

    $gameTroop.members().forEach(function(enemy) {
        if (enemy.enemyId() === 85 && enemy.isAlive()) {
enemy._shieldProjectLife += 1;            
enemy.setStateCounter(265, 'x' + enemy._shieldProjectLife);
        }
    });

}
</damage formula>

name: Savage Twilight
note:
<Learn Cost: 2500 Gold>
<Max Mastery Level: 10>
<Custom Cost Display>
\fs[21]\c[2]5% of Current HP\c[0] + 
</Custom Cost Display>

<Cannot Counter>

<damage formula>
chance = (user.skillMasteryLevel(901) + 10) * 0.01;
bonus = 1 + (user.skillMasteryLevel(901) * 0.1);
hpsac = Math.ceil(user.hp * 0.05);
value = (user.atk * bonus) - Math.floor((user.atk * bonus) * ((target.def)*0.05)/(20+0.05*(target.def))) + hpsac;
if (Math.random() < chance){
var turnno = Math.floor(Math.random() * 2) + 1;
target.addState(453);
target.setStateTurns(453, turnno);}
</damage formula>

<Learn Show Eval>
var id = user.actorId();
var lock = 1040 + id;
if ($gameSwitches.value(lock) === true){
value = true;}
else{
value = false;}
</Learn Show Eval>

<Learn Require Eval>
if (user.level >= 45 || $gameSwitches.value(1000) == true){
var actorid = user.actorId();
var getactive = 1490 + actorid * 10 + 1;
var gettotal = 1490 + actorid * 10 + 4;
var total = 1490 + actorid * 10 + 6;
var totalactive = $gameVariables.value(getactive);
var totalskill = $gameVariables.value(gettotal);
var maxtotal = $gameVariables.value(total);
if (totalskill < maxtotal){
value = true;}
else {value = false;}}
else{
value = false;}
</Learn Require Eval>

<Learn Cost Eval>
var actorid = user.actorId();
var getactive = 1490 + actorid * 10 + 1;
var gettotal = 1490 + actorid * 10 + 4;
var total = 1490 + actorid * 10 + 6;
var totalactive = $gameVariables.value(getactive);
var totalskill = $gameVariables.value(gettotal);
var maxtotal = $gameVariables.value(total);
if (totalskill < maxtotal){
$gameVariables.setValue(gettotal, $gameVariables.value(gettotal) + 1);
$gameVariables.setValue(getactive, $gameVariables.value(getactive) + 1);}
else {$gameVariables.setValue(gettotal, maxtotal);}

name: Pressuring Uppercut
note:
<Learn Cost: 3500 Gold>
<Multiple Elements: 16>
<Max Mastery Level: 10>

<damage formula>
var base = Math.ceil((0.5 + user.skillMasteryLevel(922) * 0.1) * user.def);
var bonus = Math.ceil((0.1 + user.skillMasteryLevel(922) * 0.01) * user.def);
var totalbonus = (bonus * target.getStateCategoryAffectedCount('Ailment')) + (bonus * target.getStateCategoryAffectedCount('Positive') * 2);
value = (base + totalbonus) - Math.floor((base + totalbonus) * ((target.def)*0.05)/(20+0.05*(target.def)));
var text = '(+' + totalbonus + '!)';
var motion = 'Pop High, Fall High, Pop Low, Fall Low, Wait, Wait';
var font = 'this.standardFontFace()';
var size = '26';
var color = '#74f5fc';
target.callCustomPopup(text, motion, font, size, color, 45, 0);
var poscount = target.getStateCategoryAffectedCount('Positive');
var ailcount = target.getStateCategoryAffectedCount('Ailment');
var chance = (5 + user.skillMasteryLevel(922) + poscount * 4 + ailcount * 2) * 0.01;
if (Math.random() < chance){
var rate = -chance;
var max = BattleManager.ctbTarget();
var bonus = rate * max + target.ctbSpeed();
target.setCTBSpeed(bonus);
target.startAnimation(408);}

<damage formula>
if (target.isStateCategoryAffected('Undead') || target.hasTag("Demon")){
if (!target.hasTag("Boss")){
target.setHp(0);}}
var slvl = 1 + user.skillMasteryLevel(945) * 0.2;
var slvl2 = 0.15 + user.skillMasteryLevel(945) * 0.02;
value = (user.mat * slvl + user.mmp * slvl2) - Math.round((user.mat * slvl + user.mmp * slvl2) * ((target.mdf)*0.05)/(20+0.05*(target.mdf)));
var members = user.friendsUnit().aliveMembers();
var affected = [];
for (var i = 0; i < members.length; ++i) {
var member = members[i];
if (member && !member.isStateAffected(200)) {
affected.push(member);}}
for (var i = 0; i < affected.length; ++i) {
var member = affected[i];
member.removeStateCategory('Ailment', 2);
member.addState(200);}

var slvl = user.skillMasteryLevel(955) * 0.02;

var base = 0;
var random = Math.floor(Math.random() * 3) + 1;
if (random === 1){
base = 0.35;
core = user.atk;}
if (random === 2){
base = 0.4;
core = user.agi;}
if (random === 3){
base = 0.3;
core = user.luk;}
var dmg = Math.ceil((slvl + base) * core);
value = dmg - Math.floor(dmg * ((target.def)*0.05)/(20+0.05*(target.def)));
var chance = 0.25 + user.skillMasteryLevel(955) * 0.05;
if (Math.random() < chance && user.isStateAffected(101)){
target.addState(501);}
